title: Deployed orders-service v2.4.0
description: Release v2.4.0 introduced a new reporting query path on orders-db. No index added for the new filter columns.

title: orders-db high DTU utilization
description: orders-db sustained 95-100% DTU for several hours. API p95 latency rose from 180ms to 1.4s. Began shortly after v2.4.0 deploy.

title: Egress bandwidth spike
description: Outbound bandwidth from prod-data-store tripled vs baseline.

title: Hotfix orders-service v2.4.1
description: Added covering index ix_orders_report and query timeout. DTU returned toward baseline.
